channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Leak from pond, 3rd May
item.description:
Water leaking from the pond on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Surrey Quays Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Coffee machine dumped, 3rd May
item.description:
Coffee machine dumped in park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Globe Pond Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London

item.title: Signage indecipherable, 3rd May
item.description:
Cannot rear sign, what's yhr point of it. Reported several times
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Tyron Way, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus idling in residential area, 3rd May
item.description:
A bus of Comet Coach Hire (CCH) was parked and idling in Eccleston Square where buses and heavy vehicles must not enter.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full black bin liner on pavement Graham Rd, 3rd May
item.description:
This black sack, with some object in it has been here for about a week now. On the pavement near pedestrian crossing in front of 153 Graham Road (A1207). Please fix. Many thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Graham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ewaste bin is open, 3rd May
item.description:
Ewaste bin is open on acorn walk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holyoake Footpath, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Felixstowe Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regular fly tipping here, 3rd May
item.description:
Happens very frequently at this spot.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paston Crescent, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath damaged, 3rd May
item.description:
Trip hazard on footpath, please repair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163, Blackfen Road, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian crossing out of order, 3rd May
item.description:
The only safe crossing point on danson road serving danson park is out of order. The buttons for the on demand crossing not activating the signals. Have just had to help an elderly person cross by fully stopping traffic in both directions with hand signals. Really unsafe!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on footpath, 3rd May
item.description:
There is graffti on footpath in chalk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holyoake Footpath, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of empty drinks bottles and cans, 3rd May
item.description:
Carrier bag full of empties. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunwich Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven dropped curb, 3rd May
item.description:
There is an uneven dropped curb that means wheelchairs can not use it and have to go in the main road to travel to the next dropped curb. This is very unsafe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 180, Blackfen Road, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The LTN sign has been moved, 3rd May
item.description:
The LTN sign has been pushed around so it is not clearly visible by drivers heading towards Blackheath

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vanbrugh Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti needs removing please, 3rd May
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Road, Coldharbour, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (offensive)

item.title: Abandoned (unpaid?) garden waste bin, 3rd May
item.description:
This bin has been left at the corner of Friendly Street and Friendly Street Mews. People have used it to put stuff in but is not a paid for bin. I have emptied it out and taped it shut. Please can Lewisham remove this bin?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Friendly Street, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on pavement on Wernbrook Street, 3rd May
item.description:
Photo taken 3rd May 2026. Just off Waverley Crescent as you turn into the east side of Wernbrook Street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Admaston Road, Plumstead

item.title: Abandoned Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement, 3rd May
item.description:
Abandoned Lime hire bikes blocking the pavement and road dangerous as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody. Opposite Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet
